name: seo-optimizer
description: Search Engine Optimization specialist for content strategy, technical SEO, keyword research, and ranking improvements. Use when optimizing website content, improving search rankings, conducting keyword analysis, or implementing SEO best practices. Expert in on-page SEO, meta tags, schema markup, and Core Web Vitals.
capabilities: Conduct keyword research and analyze search intent
Optimize title tags and meta descriptions for better CTR
Implement structured data and schema markup
Improve Core Web Vitals (LCP, FID, CLS)
Audit websites for technical SEO issues
Create SEO-friendly content structure and internal linking
author: davila7
securitySummary: Pure markdown documentation skill containing only SEO guidance. No executable code, file system access, network calls, or environment variables. All 88 static findings are false positives caused by markdown code fences, schema.org URLs, and SEO terminology misidentified as security patterns.
valueStatement: Poor search visibility limits organic traffic and growth. This skill provides comprehensive guidance on keyword research, on-page optimization, technical SEO, and Core Web Vitals to improve search rankings and drive organic traffic.
limitations: Does not access external SEO tools or APIs directly
Cannot modify live websites without explicit user instruction
Provides guidance only; actual implementation requires user action

useCases.title: Create SEO-friendly content
useCases.description: Optimize blog posts and articles for search engines while maintaining readability and user value.

useCases.title: Implement technical SEO
useCases.description: Add schema markup, optimize Core Web Vitals, and fix technical issues that hurt search rankings.

useCases.title: Develop SEO strategy
useCases.description: Research keywords, plan content clusters, and build a comprehensive organic search strategy.

promptTemplates.title: Basic content check
promptTemplates.prompt: Review this content for SEO optimization. Check the title tag, meta description, heading structure, keyword usage, and internal linking. Suggest specific improvements.

promptTemplates.title: Keyword research
promptTemplates.prompt: Help me identify primary and secondary keywords for a page about [TOPIC]. Consider search intent, competition, and content opportunities.

promptTemplates.title: Technical audit
promptTemplates.prompt: Perform a technical SEO audit for a page at [URL]. Check Core Web Vitals, schema markup, URL structure, mobile-friendliness, and indexing status.

promptTemplates.title: Content strategy
promptTemplates.prompt: Create a topic cluster strategy for [MAIN TOPIC]. Identify the pillar page topic, supporting cluster articles, keyword mapping, and internal linking structure.

bestPractices: Include primary keyword in title tag, H1, first paragraph, and URL slug naturally
Use descriptive anchor text for internal links instead of click here
Optimize for Core Web Vitals: LCP under 2.5s, FID under 100ms, CLS under 0.1
antiPatterns: Keyword stuffing or forcing keywords into content unnaturally
Ignoring search intent when targeting keywords
Forgetting mobile optimization and page speed requirements

faq.question: Is this skill compatible with all AI coding tools?
faq.answer: Yes. The skill works with Claude, Codex, and Claude Code. Prompt templates are compatible with any LLM-based assistant.

faq.question: What search volume should I target for keywords?
faq.answer: Balance search volume with competition. Start with long-tail keywords for easier ranking then expand to broader terms.

faq.question: How do I integrate SEO guidance into my workflow?
faq.answer: Use the skill during content planning, before publishing, or during regular site audits. Request specific optimizations.

faq.question: Does this skill store or transmit my data?
faq.answer: No. This is a prompt-based skill with no file access, network calls, or data storage. All analysis happens in conversation.

faq.question: What are reasonable Core Web Vitals targets?
faq.answer: LCP under 2.5 seconds, FID under 100ms, and CLS under 0.1. Page speed under 3 seconds load time is a good baseline.

faq.question: How does this compare to automated SEO tools?
faq.answer: This skill provides strategic guidance and best practices. Automated tools like Ahrefs or SEMrush provide data. Use both together.
